source: Orders Verified Data.xlsx · Raw Data + Monthly Average + Month to Month Veified Raw Data
comment: Per-customer verified order data. Three signals captured: (1) per-year order counts + USD totals (from Raw Data), (2) MONTHLY AVERAGE revenue by year (from Monthly Average sheet — used for apples-to-apples YoY trend since 2026 is partial), (3) Live Date (year customer went live) + Months to Launch (from Month to Month Veified Raw Data sheet — answers Launch Status without HubSpot note scanning).
